definition: Formed or devised a plan or idea in the mind
example: Four score and seven years ago our fathers brought forth on this continent a new nation, conceived in liberty.

definition: A statement or assertion that expresses a judgment or opinion
example: Dedicated to the proposition that all men are created equal.

definition: Suffer something difficult or unpleasant patiently
example: Now we are engaged in a great civil war, testing whether that nation can long endure.

definition: Honor as holy; make holy; consecrate
example: We have come to dedicate a portion of that field as a final resting place for those who here gave their lives that that nation might live.

definition: Take away; diminish the value of
example: The world will little note, nor long remember what we say here, but it can never forget what they did here.

definition: Not finished; incomplete
example: It is for us the living, rather, to be dedicated here to the unfinished work which they who fought here have thus far so nobly advanced.

definition: In a noble manner; with nobility
example: They who fought here have thus far so nobly advanced.

definition: Decide firmly on a course of action
example: That we here highly resolve that these dead shall not have died in vain.

definition: Producing no result; useless
example: That these dead shall not have died in vain.

definition: Suffer death, typically in a violent, sudden, or untimely way
example: That government of the people, by the people, for the people, shall not perish from the earth.

definition: The fact or process of being set free from legal, social, or political restrictions
example: The emancipation of the slave was the great cause of his presidency.

definition: The action or fact of joining together
example: A house divided against itself cannot stand; this Union must be preserved.

definition: Separated into parts; having a separate opinion or aim
example: A house divided against itself cannot stand.

definition: The state of being free within society from oppressive restrictions
example: Conceived in liberty and dedicated to the proposition that all men are created equal.

definition: The state of being equal, especially in status, rights, or opportunities
example: All men are created equal.

definition: The intention or desire to do evil; ill will
example: With malice toward none, with charity for all.

definition: The voluntary giving of help to those in need
example: With malice toward none, with charity for all.

definition: The quality of being steady, secure, or fixed; resoluteness
example: Let us have faith that right makes might, and in that faith, let us, to the end, dare to do our duty as we understand it.

definition: The quality of being morally right or justifiable
example: Let us have faith that right makes might.

definition: Property that is or may be inherited; an inheritance
example: Our fathers brought forth a new nation that is our common heritage.
